They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

From the anodizing line to live assembly, Tim witnesses American ingenuity in action as a rifle comes to life before his eyes. With the epic 10,000-Round Challenge complete, it’s time for some serious maintenance. The crew at SEAL 1 steps in with their cutting-edge nanotechnology to give the battle-worn BCM AK the deep clean it deserves. Once the guns are gleaming, it’s time to send rounds downrange. Teaming up with top firearms influencer Sootch, Tim takes aim at a new challenge, including a 1,000-yard Wild Shot that pushes precision, patience, and performance to the limit.

programme.title: Sequoia & Kings Canyon National Parks
programme.desc: Step into a world of ancient giants. This cinematic journey travels deep into the heart of the southern Sierra Nevada, where the largest trees on Earth stand as silent sentinels of time. Witness the filtered golden light of the 'Giant Forest,' the rugged granite canyons of the Kings River, and the quiet, mist-filled meadows that lie in the shadow of these wooden titans. An immersive experience designed to bring the scale and serenity of the High Sierra's most majestic groves into your home.

programme.title: California's Wild Coast
programme.desc: Soar with the seabirds over the wild and beautiful north coast of California. The rugged coastline of Mendocino is a vast wilderness full of wildlife, sea caves, bird colonies, and crashing waves that can only be fully appreciated from an aerial view. This 2.5 hour film is an exhilarating flight over this magnificent landscape. Soul stirring ambient music accompanies the spectacular cinematography of "California's Wild Coast"

programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: Paul Carcaterra heads to Evanston, IL to visit with Northwestern's Izzy Scane. Izzy has been a dominant force for the Wildcats since she first arrived on campus. With a National title, the Tewaaraton Award winner, and record shattering season – she has cemented herself as an all-time great. We also went to Charlottesville, VA to dissect the elite game of Connor Shellenberger: a hometown hero, and arguably the best player in history for the University of Virginia.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 16 (Season 3) of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon. In this episode, Mitch and the boys discuss everything that happened in the PLL during Charlotte Weekend, including CJ Kirst's 6-goal performance in a Philadelphia Waterdogs revenge win over the Boston Cannons. They also react to some proposed rule changes in College Lacrosse, then James Hogan provides an update on the NCAA Transfer Portal. Utah Archers goalie Brett Dobson joins the show for an interview.

programme.title: Marcus Holman and the Moment He Became Obsessed with Lacrosse
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Marcus Holman - one of lacrosse’s greatest shooters and leaders - for an honest conversation about family, obsession, adversity, longevity, and chasing the all-time goals record. Marcus takes us back to his earliest memories from John's Hopkins’ locker room to the moment he fell in love with shooting He opens up about evolving his role, becoming a leader, sustaining greatness into his mid-30s, and what it would mean to cement his legacy in the record books.

programme.title: S1E1 Lucha
programme.desc: Ian Hodgkinson, known as Vampiro in the world of wrestling, was a famed wrestler in the late 80’s and 90’s. Today, he shifted his career to being behind the scenes as a Story Producer for AAA, the top wrestling company in Lucha Libre. Hodgkinson intimately peels back the curtain on the mysteries of this show, how it’s produced, and what life is like on and off the stage. We dive deep in to the lives of two wrestlers and follow their stories as they prep for their next fight: El Hijo Del Fantasma, an up and coming star who seemingly has it all, as well as Faby Apache, a veteran female wrestler struggling to stay relevant as she raises her son.
